---
title: "Explainability and privacy in AI-enabled crop monitoring: Trends and future directions in soybean research"
date: 2026-03-01
author:
  - name: Barbedo, Jayme Garcia Arnal
  - name: Da Silva, Marcelo Santos
  - name: Cazzolato, Mirela Teixeira
  - name: Valem, Lucas Pascotti
  - name: Tinós, Renato
  - name: Romero, Roseli Aparecida Francelin
  - name: Murta, Luiz Otavio
  - name: De Jesus Holanda, Adriano
  - name: Felipe, Joaquim Cezar
  - name: Pinheiro, José Baldin
  - name: Chagas, José Tiago Barroso
  - name: Da Silva, Roberto Fray
  - name: Tetila, Everton Castelão
  - name: De Castro Jorge, Lucio Andre
  - name: Yuan, Huaqiang
  - name: Li, Weiling
  - name: Kotecha, Ketan
  - name: Zhao, Liang
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Computers and Electronics in Agriculture"
  volume: 243
  doi: "10.1016/j.compag.2025.111392"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Explainability and privacy in AI-enabled crop monitoring: Trends and future directions in soybean research</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
